message:
fix(codegen): Fix __global_allocatornull bug and export multibytecodec_support

Fixes two critical codegen bugs affecting 11 tests in core1:

1. __global_allocatornull concatenation bug:
   - When calling self.method() with no args but needs_alloc=true,
     allocator was emitted without comma before null params
   - Result: __global_allocatornull instead of __global_allocator, null
   - Fix: Track allocator_emitted flag, add comma before first null

2. Missing multibytecodec_support export:
   - File existed but wasn't exported in Lib/test/support.zig
   - Caused 'no member named multibytecodec_support' errors
   - Fix: Add pub const export line

Impact: core1 codegen pass rate improved from 13% (6/46) to 36% (17/46)
